name: City of Clovis LF
notes: Accepts bifacial modules with intact frames; glass breakage fee may apply.

name: Allied Imperial Landfill
notes: Conditional on TCLP pass; minimum load 5 tons.

name: Bakersfield Metropolitan SLF (BENA)
notes: Routine PV loads accepted; contact gatehouse 24h ahead.

name: Antelope Valley Recycling and Disposal Facility
notes: Facility policy excludes PV modules; refer to LA County HHW program.

name: Angelina County Waste Management Center
notes: Accepts decommissioned residential panels; no broken glass loads.

name: New Boston Landfill
notes: Conditional acceptance for utility-scale only with pre-approval.

name: Royal Oaks Landfill
notes: Standard MSW tipping rates apply; TCLP required for all PV.

name: Huachuca City Landfill
notes: Small loads accepted without appointment; max 2 tons per trip.

name: Cinder Lake MSW LF
notes: Seasonal restrictions May–Sep; TCLP and manifest required.

name: Carson City Sanitary Landfill
notes: Accepts intact crystalline-silicon panels; no thin-film.

name: Boulder City LF
notes: Low-volume residential PV accepted at standard gate rate.

name: Broward County Landfill
notes: County ordinance prohibits PV in MSW stream; use certified recycler.

name: Citrus County Central Landfill
notes: Utility-scale only with waste characterization report.

name: NJMC 1-E Landfill
notes: Policy under review; call environmental compliance before delivery.

name: Clint Landfill
notes: Cross-border loads require Texas manifest; TCLP mandatory.
